description: Happy path: channel_overview with real channel data returns real data_source and no placeholders

expect.section_body: markdown-formatted body referencing home decor aesthetic and DIY niche
expect.data_source: real or mixed depending on null fields in channel_data
expect.placeholders_to_fill: array present; may list top_demographics if surfaced as missing

prohibit: fabricated subscriber counts or view figures
data_source set to real when top_demographics is null and referenced
benchmark_label present when data_source is real

description: Minimal input: rates_summary with no channel_data falls back to benchmark ranges with disclaimer

expect.benchmark_label: non-null string describing benchmark source and tier
expect.section_body: contains labeled benchmark ranges, not presented as personal rates
expect.placeholders_to_fill: array listing fields that need real data before publishing
expect.fabrication_check: PASS or FLAG explaining omitted fields

prohibit: benchmark ranges presented as the creator's personal rates
data_source set to real when no channel_data was supplied
specific CPM or engagement figures stated as the creator's own
benchmark_label null when data_source is benchmark

description: Edge case: case_study section with no recent_case_study returns placeholder block and flags all required fields

expect.placeholders_to_fill: non-empty array listing all case study fields that need real data
expect.section_body: structured placeholder block, not a fabricated campaign narrative
expect.fabrication_check: FLAG with reason explaining absent case study data

prohibit: invented brand campaign or performance outcomes
fabricated engagement metrics or conversion figures
data_source set to real or benchmark for a case study with no source data
empty placeholders_to_fill array when all case study data is null
